claim: The opened DILANTIN label supports treatment of tonic-clonic seizures.
source_title: DILANTIN (extended phenytoin sodium capsules) prescribing information
quoted_evidence: DILANTIN is indicated for the treatment of tonic-clonic (grand mal) ... seizures.
limitation: Product label evidence does not establish an ICD subtype or patient-specific indication.

claim: The opened DILANTIN label supports treatment of psychomotor (temporal lobe) seizures.
source_title: DILANTIN (extended phenytoin sodium capsules) prescribing information
quoted_evidence: DILANTIN is indicated for the treatment of ... psychomotor (temporal lobe) seizures.
limitation: Older label terminology is preserved; it is not used to choose an ICD candidate.

claim: The opened TEGRETOL label supports partial seizures with complex symptomatology.
quoted_evidence: Partial seizures with complex symptomatology (psychomotor, temporal lobe).
limitation: Label supports a seizure category, not a specific ICD code assignment.

claim: The opened TEGRETOL label supports generalized tonic-clonic seizures.
limitation: The same label notes mixed patterns and non-epilepsy use; no patient inference is allowed.

claim: Current MedlinePlus information supports valproic acid for certain seizure types without naming an ICD subtype.
quoted_evidence: Valproic acid is used to treat certain types of seizures.
limitation: The opened source does not specify which seizure subtypes in this sentence; classify only as broad epilepsy.
